title: Connectivity Topologies: Qubit Interaction Graphs
description: Understand how qubit connectivity affects algorithm implementation and circuit depth. Compare heavy-hex, linear, 2D grid, and all-to-all topologies across hardware platforms.
learningObjectives: Describe common qubit connectivity topologies and their graph-theoretic properties
Calculate the SWAP overhead for implementing algorithms on different topologies
Analyze how connectivity affects circuit depth and error accumulation
Compare native connectivity across hardware platforms
Design qubit mapping strategies for specific topologies
